{{Quote|Master Skywalker, there are too many of them! What are we going to do?|Sors Bandeam's final words|<ref name="ROTS" />}}
'''Sors Bandeam''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] enrolled in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Sors Bandeam was given to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|education]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Sorted into a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] Bandeam remained at the Temple as many of his [[Jedi instructor|instructors]] fought and died during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="ROTS" />

[[File:Bandeam.png|thumb|left|180px|Sors Bandeam moments before being murdered by Darth Vader.]]
When [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] betrayed the Order in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] by issuing [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Initiate Bandeam was present with his [[Unidentified Jedi clan|clan]] at the Temple when the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] marched up the [[Processional Way/Legends|Processional Way]]. Seeking refuge in the [[Jedi Council Chamber/Legends|High Council Chamber]] high atop one of the [[High Council Tower/Legends|Temple's towers]], he and his peers were pleased when Jedi [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] walked into the chamber. Believing the famed hero was there to save them from the attacking [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]], the children were caught unaware when the Jedi-turned-[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] ignited his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and slew the younglings after Sors asked Skywalker. Indeed, Skywalker had fallen to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and was now known as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="ROTS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Sors Bandeam was played by the uncredited [[Ross Beadman]] in the [[2005]] film [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], the final installment of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[prequel trilogy]].<ref name="ROTS" /> The character's name is actually a curious anagram of his portrayer's name.<ref name="Ross' Story">{{YouTube|video=xfCdh8OgA7w|text=Star Wars Exclusive Interview: Sors Bandeam|channel=channel/UCrSaCvf4KskVl2GzLw2UQhA|name=Spicy Coconut Productions}}</ref>

Beadman got the role after his mother contacted a casting agency, which sent her an e-mail saying that there was a casting call of child actors for Episode III. To prepare for the role, Beadman saw all three films of the [[original trilogy]] in VHS tapes before actually getting the part of Sors Bandeam. The character's name was created by the agency and was written in the e-mail response about Beadman getting the part.<ref name="Ross' Story" /> According to Beadman, the role gave him some sort of popularity back at his school as most of his classmates liked ''Revenge of the Sith'', though his classmates were the ones who told him about his character's death, having been lied to by his parents to believe that his character survived the film.<ref name="Beadman AMA">{{Reddit|url=r/IAmA/comments/jwmi7f/im_ross_beadman_the_actor_who_played_the_jedi|thread=I'm Ross Beadman. The actor who played the Jedi youngling in Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith who spoke to and was killed by Anakin Skywalker! Ask me anything…|author=RossBandeam|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/75RpJ}}</ref>

Originally, Sors Bandeam was to have an unspeaking part in the film, but the casting director eventually opted to have Beadman say the line "Master Skywalker, there are too many of them! What are we going to do?".<ref name="Ross' Story" /> This can be proven in the film's [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith Illustrated Screenplay|illustrated screenplay]]: there, all the younglings present at the room said the line before Anakin proceeded to slaughter them.<ref name="Ep. III Illustrated Screenplay">[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith Illustrated Screenplay|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith Illustrated Screenplay'']]</ref> To shoot his scene, Beadman was somewhat nervous and it took him four takes to get the scene right. During filming, [[Hayden Christensen]] shouted "Boo!" at Beadman, which startled him and led him to stumble back just as Christensen's character activates his lightsaber.<ref name="Beadman AMA" />
